text: Which letter represents the 'ee' sound (as in 'feet')?
Which letter is the retroflex 'ṭa' sound?

instruction: Match each letter to its correct sound

hint: The first letter of the Hindi alphabet! Draw the vertical line on the right, the curved body on the left, and the headline on top.

text: Which group does the letter 'भ' belong to?
subtext: Think about where in the mouth the sound is produced

hint: The first consonant! Draw the vertical line on the right, then the angular body that looks like a 'less than' sign with a small hook.

text: How many vowels (स्वर) are there in Hindi?
subtext: Think back to the vowel episodes

instruction: Match each word to its meaning — test your vocabulary!

hint: A dental consonant. Draw a curved body with a vertical stroke and the headline. It looks similar to 'द' but with an additional vertical stroke.

title: 🎉 Alphabet Complete!
takeaways: You now know all 13 vowels (स्वर) and 35 consonants (व्यंजन) of the Hindi alphabet!
Vowels: अ आ इ ई उ ऊ ऋ ए ऐ ओ औ अं अः
Consonant groups: कवर्ग, चवर्ग, टवर्ग, तवर्ग, पवर्ग + semivowels & sibilants
You can now recognize, write, and pronounce every letter in Devanagari!
Next up: combining consonants with vowel signs (मात्रा) to form complete words!
Keep practicing — the more you read and write, the faster it becomes natural!
